reviews.review_description: Feels a lot like a Legend of Zelda but in first person. Great game, i wish there were more of these types of games. One of the best VR experiences with no sickness.
It's very cute, feels like being inside an old Nintendo game. Controls didn't cooperate well for me and it froze then crashed. Loved it while it was working!
Keeps crashing
I like the game looks and stuff but it crashes way too much on my oculus go, if you ever have the time to fix, do it

There is a level where there is nothing to do to get past it, or maybe I am just not seeing it. It also kicks me out a lot and I have to reload and start all over again to get where I left off. if you ignore or don’t have those problems, it is a pretty good game,but I have those problems so that it why I give the game a two star rating.

Some months back , I delete this game because its problem ( during playing , it stops and I couldent continue it  ) now I re installed it and unfortunately I saw the problem is present yet , PLEASE FIX THE PROBLEM !

Beautiful game and very immersive. You have to mimic the motion in the game to keep from getting disoriented. I don't have a game pad though and using the TouchPad did make my arm sore after playing a few levels. Best free game I've played so far.

I really want to play this game, as it seems like the type of game I love.  However, it keeps kicking me out and shutting down at the same place everytime. Once I get pass the intro and I am ready to step out of the Giant's hand, I am kicked out and have to start over, again and again. I have an Oculus Go, and I have deleted and reinstalled, but it doesn't help. Has anyone been able to fix this glitch?
Bout my gear a few days ago and have been looking for a good action adventure game. If you to outwit your foes and want a legend of Zelda experience this game is for you
At first glance it looks good but really it keeps crashing would love for it to be fixed.overall don't waste ur time downloading it. 2 stars
I just want to go on more quests. I just pretend I'm Indiana jones.  Worth all the effort put into it. Works great on s6 .
Won't stop crashing after every level I honestly raged over this 😂
Over 8 days off people telling you about glitches and kicking them out; and you still ain't fixed it. Looks incredibly awesome, fix the glitch!!!

reviews.review_title: Make a sequel, it's worth it!
reviews.review_description:
This game is nice, the cartoon style graphics are good, the free movement is a great plus, the puzzles and battle are cool but it's way too short, that's why I didn't give 5 stars! 
For Christ sake, make a sequel or prequel or more levels, seriously, people like me will happily buy it. 
If it was at least an hour long, I'd pay 7~9 bucks, cause it's very entertaining and immersive. Also the boss battle was good, quite challenging.

I just downloaded it and I can hardly get past the golem telling you to fix his problem after the tutorial because of crashes. Then I have to start again because I can’t select Continue before it resets entirely. Please fix this!!!
The game has good gameplay, but the experience is sort of ruined by the game crashing every time you pass a level. Fix this odd bug and you’ve got a worthwhile VR experience.
It keeps crashing but its free🤷🏿‍♀️🙅🏻‍♀️🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚🌚
Crashes. I can't play!!! Plus, it doesn't tell you ANYTHING on how to play besides the controls. DON'T PLAY!!!
I liked the look of this game, it reminded me of Rayman but It keeps crashing on me, really annoying
Bad game
